minimal_intervention_steps: Increase trial count and enforce deterministic warmup + fixed telemetry windows to reduce variance.
Promote energy estimation to direct sampling or calibrated proxy to reduce ECD volatility.
Retain current holdout requirement and validation transfer checks; do not relax acceptance gates.
Only after variance reduction, rerun skeptic stage and confirm no downgrade trigger.

most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.why: Directly influences ECD; high variability propagates into skeptic variance trigger.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.upgrade_to_direct: Use hardware power sampling (NVML/RAPL/board telemetry) synchronized to trial window.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.stronger_proxy: Calibrated joules model fitted to direct power traces per benchmark and batch profile.

most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.why: Feeds quality-adjusted throughput and ECD; estimated-only path adds uncertainty.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.upgrade_to_direct: Run benchmark task outputs with actual scoring pipeline per split.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.stronger_proxy: Confidence-bounded quality estimator validated against scored subsets.

most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.why: Primary skeptic signal; derived metric amplifies uncertainty from runtime and energy.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.upgrade_to_direct: Compute from direct quality, runtime, energy measurements only.
most_load_bearing_estimated_metrics.stronger_proxy: Propagate measurement uncertainty and require bounded CI width before skeptic review.
